decision.summary: Hold the April 15 73k dip position and skip new price-hit and floor entries.
decision.rationale: The latest 2026-04-14 Beecthor transcript and recent summaries still keep the thesis bearish below 75k-76k, treating the rebound as corrective and still favoring another leg down toward roughly 70.3k and possibly 67.9k. Binance at 74163.8 is weak intraday and near the 24h low, but the only open position, `will-bitcoin-dip-to-73k-on-april-15` Yes, is only around 35.0% and far below the 90-95% take-profit zone, while early-stage rules disable stop-loss. For new entries, the daily price-hit slot is already filled by the nearest bearish daily strike, the weekly bearish alternatives are too discounted for a clean edge (best available 68k Apr 13-19 at 10.5%), and the floor markets above 74k are invalid because Beecthor’s active thesis still allows BTC to break back below 74k.
